alkylation reagent: incubation with 5.5 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature
alkylation concentration: incubation with 5.5 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested overnight either with endoproteinase Lys-C (1:100 [wt/wt]; Wako)
fragmentation method: Higher-energy collisional dissociation MS/MS scans of the 7 (Top7 data-dependent method)
instrument: transferred into an online coupled Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: transferred into an online coupled Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer by nanoelectrospray ionization
labeling: peptides were separated by an Easy-nL 1200 ultra-high-performance liquid chromatography (UHPLC) instrument
reduction reagent: 1 mM dithiothreitol [DTT], 10 mM KCl, 16 μM ZnSO4, and 20 mM MgCl2
reduction concentration: 1 mM dithiothreitol [DTT], 10 mM KCl, 16 μM ZnSO4, and 20 mM MgCl2
